Name: CAP3785 - Data Analytics and Visualization
Description: This course gives a broad overview of the various aspects of data analytics and visualizations. Students will learn ways of accessing data from various sources such as web APIs and repositories, techniques of cleaning data and organizing data for analysis, using analytical methods to solve real-world problems, and create visualizations to aid the interpretation of analysis results. Students will have hands on training using relevant programming languages, and analytics and visualization tools

Modules.ModuleName: Introduction to Data Analytics and the Analytics Lifecycle
Ethics, Data Types, and Data Sources in Analytics
Data Quality Assessment and Data Cleaning Fundamentals
Database Basics and Relational Data Concepts
Advanced Excel Functions and Statistical Tools
Pivot Tables, Dashboards, and Power Query in Excel
Data Visualization Principles and Excel Charting
SQL Fundamentals: Queries, Filtering, and Sorting
SQL Joins, Relationships, and Advanced Query Techniques
Data Manipulation and Cleaning with NumPy and Pandas
Hypothesis Testing, Correlation, and Regression Analysis
Advanced Data Visualization with Python Libraries
Introduction to Machine Learning for Business Analytics
